scenarios.title: Scope widening
scenarios.description: Child block tries to grant a capability the parent does not have.
scenarios.chain_change: Block 2 adds 'delete' to scopes — parent only has ['read', 'write'].
scenarios.explanation: Each delegation block's scopes MUST be a subset of its parent's scopes. AIP rejects on parse, before any work happens.

scenarios.title: Replay after expiry
scenarios.description: An old token reused after its expiry timestamp.
scenarios.chain_change: All blocks have expires=2026-05-08T15:00:00Z; the verifier's clock is 2026-05-08T16:00:00Z.
scenarios.explanation: The verifier checks every block in the chain against current time. Even one expired block rejects the whole token.

scenarios.title: Depth bypass
scenarios.description: Chain length exceeds the max_depth set in the root block.
scenarios.chain_change: Authority block sets max_depth=3, but the chain contains 4 delegation blocks.
scenarios.explanation: max_depth is fixed at the authority block. No descendant can extend it. AIP rejects depth-bypass attempts even if every signature is valid.
